utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh hey ! There is some kids playing in the street , you wanna go down there and give them a project , ruin their day ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , if they have a ball maybe you can stick razor blades in it and teach them a new game , Gonna Need Stitches Ball .
